title: 19 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized in Lexpert Special Edition: Mining 2025
content:
## 19 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized in Lexpert Special Edition: Mining 2025
Lexpert has named 19 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers as leading practitioners in its 2025 Special Edition: Mining, recognizing our Global Metals & Mining Group’s deep industry expertise and innovative client work.
These Lexpert -ranked lawyers were recognized for their mining-related expertise spanning Mergers & Acquisitions, Corporate Finance & Securities, Corporate Commercial Law, Project Finance, Infrastructure, Financial Services, Construction, Dispute Resolution, Real Estate, and Aboriginal and Environmental matters.
In addition to group co-leaders Eva Bellissimo , Roger Taplin and Shea Small , the following McCarthy Tétrault lawyers were recognized in this year’s publication:
- Dominique Amyot-Bilodeau
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
- Christopher W. Langdon
- Jennifer F. Longhurst
This Special Edition also features insights from Shea Small , Co-Leader of McCarthy Tétrault’s Global Metals & Mining Group and Co-Head of our M&A Group, and Christopher Langdon , Partner, on Canada’s mining sector amid global volatility. In this article, Shea discusses how joint ventures and creative deal structures are helping navigate regulatory hurdles, with copper leading investor focus and gold and silver maintaining appeal despite geopolitical headwinds. Meanwhile, Christopher dives into the resurgence of uranium — including its intersection with nuclear, environmental, indigenous and trade law.
Lexpert’s continued recognition of our Global Metals & Mining group reinforces McCarthy Tétrault’s reputation as a trusted advisor to businesses driving the future of the mining sector in Canada and globally.
Access the full Lexpert Special Edition: Mining 2025 publication on Lexpert ’s website.

### Our Global Metals & Mining Group
Our Global Metals & Mining Group has been at the forefront of complex multi-jurisdictional M&A and joint ventures, streaming and alternative financing structures, major project developments and high stakes-litigation. We advise clients on mining deals across Latin America, Africa, Australia, Europe, North America, and Asia, representing global majors, juniors, royalty and streaming companies, traders, private equity, and financial institutions. Our results-driven team delivers business-focused advice on commercial, regulatory, ESG, energy transition, critical minerals, and trade matters. Fluent in several languages and skilled in both common and civil law, we help clients navigate risk and seize opportunities worldwide.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and the delivery of client services tailored to evolving business needs, the Firm brings together legal talent, industry insight, and practical experience to support clients in achieving their strategic goals.
For more information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
